who: fleet accounting teams processing 10–20 delivery receipts/month
offer: For fleet accounting teams processing 10–20 delivery receipts/month, manual entry causes inaccuracies in expense reports. We automate the conversion of delivery receipts instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem: manual entry of delivery receipts leads to inaccuracies in expense reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 fleet accounting teams with demo video
Community forums where fleet accounting teams share tools
try_it: Let users try expense report generation and invoice entry form
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
